AC-1.notes: T-0024 implements FireflyService.getAccountHistory() with pagination + 1-hour cache (DEC-0011); T-0025 implements dominance calculator with 80% threshold + 10 min tx minimum (DEC-0012), configurable via data/dominance-config.json

AC-2.notes: T-0025 returns { dominantCategory, dominance, confidence: dominance } when threshold met (confidence = dominant share per AC-2)

AC-3.notes: T-0026 extends OpenAiService.classify() schema with confidence field (DEC-0014); return shape { category, confidence, prompt, response }

AC-4.notes: T-0027 integrates history + AI comparison in #resolveCategory, queues for review when both present; T-0028 implements PendingReviewService with JSON persistence (DEC-0013)

AC-5.notes: T-0029 provides GET /api/reviews endpoint; T-0030 implements UI review panel with transaction summary, history/AI badges with confidence, recommendation, accept/reject buttons

AC-6.notes: T-0029 provides POST /api/reviews/:id/accept (applies category + tag to Firefly) and POST /api/reviews/:id/reject (dismisses without mutation); T-0030 provides UI buttons

AC-7.notes: T-0027 inserts history check after word/keyword hints in #resolveCategory; hard rules (account mapping step 1, auto-cat step 2) still short-circuit before history analysis per DEC-0001

AC-8.notes: AC-8 requires docs/user-guides/US-0004.md to document review workflow (USER_GUIDE_MODE=1). No task explicitly creates this user guide document. T-0031 covers tests for AC-1 through AC-8 but does not create the user guide itself.

gaps_identified.impact: AC-8 cannot be satisfied without explicit user guide documentation task
gaps_identified.recommendation: Add task T-0032 to create docs/user-guides/US-0004.md following the pattern established by US-0002 (docs/user-guides/US-0002.md). User guide should document: review workflow, pending review queue, accept/reject actions, confidence interpretation, threshold configuration.

DEC-0011.notes: 1-hour in-memory cache implemented via #accountHistoryCache Map with 3600000ms TTL

DEC-0012.notes: 80% dominance threshold + 10 min tx minimum, configurable via data/dominance-config.json

DEC-0013.notes: In-memory array + write-through JSON persistence at data/pending-category-reviews.json; async serialization via Node.js event loop

DEC-0014.notes: Extend classify() schema with confidence field (type: number, min: 0, max: 1); preserve strict: true + additionalProperties: false

dependency_chain_validation.notes: Dependency chain is logically sound. T-0024/T-0025/T-0026/T-0028 can run in parallel (no dependencies). T-0027 depends on all four (integration). T-0029 depends on T-0028 (queue persistence). T-0030 depends on T-0029 (REST API). T-0031 depends on T-0025/T-0028/T-0027 (tests).

task_count.notes: 8 tasks planned (T-0024–T-0031); 9 tasks required to cover AC-8 (add T-0032 for user guide); 9 ≤ 12 (SPRINT_MAX_TASKS), so no split required

risks_assessment.notes: 8 risks identified (H1–H8) in sprint.json; all have mitigations; no critical blockers

recommendation: Add task T-0032 to create docs/user-guides/US-0004.md. Update sprint.json task count to 9. Re-run plan-verify after task addition.
